title: Need a super admin profile - automate without being invited
excerpt:
In our company, a few of us are responsible for creating the automations. But sometimes we don’t need to be invited in the board, but automations does not work unless we are.

posts.author: mmorales (Michael Morales)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our company, a few of us are responsible for creating the automations. But sometimes we don’t need to be invited in the board, but automations does not work unless we are.
Of course, temporarily we must be invited to create the automation, but leave the board afterwards.

So we need a user type that allow us to create automations in boards without being invited at the board. A super admin.

thanks

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michael!

Shanine here from Mindflows. You can create a custom role that allows specific members to create automations without needing board access.

role1436×792 70.4 KB

Hope this helps!

posts.author: mmorales (Michael Morales)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, Shanine! I’ll look up to it
